---
title: 'Integrative Modeling of Milk Quality: Evaluating the Impact of Herd Health
  Risks on Bacterial Loads and Somatic Cell Counts'
author: "Luca Bernardi"
date: "2026-02-27"
output: html_document
---

```{r, exploration.1, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, fig.width = 12}
source("settings.R")
source("source_all.R")

data <- read_excel("data/raw/Latte.xlsx")
setDT(data)

dt_analysis <- na.omit(data)

dt_analysis$`Risk - IBR` <- as.factor(dt_analysis$`Risk - IBR`)
dt_analysis$`Risk - AGAL` <- as.factor(dt_analysis$`Risk - AGAL`)
dt_analysis$`Risk - PT` <- as.factor(dt_analysis$`Risk - PT`)

dt_analysis$Season <- as.factor(dt_analysis$Season)
levels(dt_analysis$Season) <- c("Autumn", "Spring", "Summer", "Winter")

dt_analysis$Year <- as.factor(dt_analysis$Year)
dt_analysis$Year_num <- as.numeric(dt_analysis$Year) - min(as.numeric(dt_analysis$Year))

dt <- dt_analysis[TBC > 100000 & SCC > 300000]

datasets <- list(dt_analysis = dt_analysis, dt = dt)

variables <- list("Season", "Risk - IBR", "Risk - PT", "Risk - AGAL")

palettes <- list(
  "Year" = c("2016" = "#7E57C2", "2017" = "#9575CD", "2018" = "#673AB7", "2019" = "#B39DDB", "2020" = "#512DA8"),
  "Season" = c("Spring" = "#9DC183", "Summer" = "#9B1B30", "Autumn" = "#DAA520", "Winter" = "#003366"),
  "Risk - IBR" = c("Low risk" = "#9DC183", "Medium risk" = "#DAA520", "High risk" = "#9B1B30"),
  "Risk - PT" = c("Low risk" = "#9DC183", "Medium risk" = "#DAA520", "High risk" = "#9B1B30"),
  "Risk - AGAL" = c("Low risk" = "#9DC183", "High risk" = "#9B1B30")
  )

dt_year <- dt_analysis[, .(meanLOG_CBT = mean(`Log CBT`), meanLOG_SCC = mean(`Log SCC`)), by = .(Year, Season)][order(Year)]
dt_month <- dt_analysis[, .(meanLOG_CBT = mean(`Log CBT`), meanLOG_SCC = mean(`Log SCC`)), by = .(Year, Month)][order(Year, Month)]

p_year_cbt <- ggplot(dt_year, aes(x = as.numeric(as.character(Year)), y = meanLOG_CBT, colour = Season)) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, linewidth = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = palettes[["Season"]]) +
  labs(
    title = "Mean Log CBT across years",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Mean Log CBT"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 12, face = "bold"),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 12), axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "lightgray", linewidth = 0.5),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), legend.position = "top", legend.title = element_text(face = "bold")
    )

p_year_scc <- ggplot(dt_year, aes(x = as.numeric(as.character(Year)), y = meanLOG_CBT, colour = Season)) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, linewidth = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = palettes[["Season"]]) +
  labs(
    title = "Mean Log SCC across years",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Mean Log SCC"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 12, face = "bold"),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 12), axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "lightgray", linewidth = 0.5),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), legend.position = "top", legend.title = element_text(face = "bold")
    )

p_month_cbt <- ggplot(dt_month, aes(x = Month, y=  meanLOG_CBT, colour = Year, group = Year)) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, linewidth = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = palettes[["Year"]]) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:12) +
  labs(
    title = "Seasonal pattern of Log CBT",
    x = "Month",
    y = "Mean Log CBT",
    colour = "Year"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 12, face = "bold"),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 12), axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "lightgray", linewidth = 0.5),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), legend.position = "top", legend.title = element_text(face = "bold")
    )

p_month_scc <- ggplot(dt_month, aes(x = Month, y = meanLOG_SCC, colour = factor(Year), group = Year)) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, linewidth = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = palettes[["Year"]]) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:12) +
  labs(
    title = "Seasonal pattern of Log SCC",
    x = "Month",
    y = "Mean Log SCC",
    colour = "Year"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 12, face = "bold"),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 12), axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "lightgray", linewidth = 0.5),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), legend.position = "top", legend.title = element_text(face = "bold")
    )

wrap_plots(c(p_year_cbt, p_year_scc, p_month_cbt, p_month_scc), ncol = 2)
```

```{r, exploration.2, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, fig.width = 12}
plots_CBT <- lapply(variables, function(y) ggplot_density(dt_analysis, "Log CBT", y, palettes[[y]], save = FALSE))
plots_SCC <- lapply(variables, function(y) ggplot_density(dt_analysis, "Log SCC", y, palettes[[y]], save = FALSE))

wrap_plots(plots_CBT, ncol = 2)
wrap_plots(plots_SCC, ncol = 2)

mu <- mean(data$`Log CBT`, na.rm = TRUE)
var <- var(data$`Log CBT`, na.rm = TRUE)

x <- seq(min(data$`Log CBT`, na.rm = TRUE), max(data$`Log CBT`, na.rm = TRUE), length.out = 500)
df <- data.frame(x = x, y = dnorm(x, mean = mu, sd = sqrt(var)))

p1 <- ggplot(data, aes(x = `Log CBT`)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y = after_stat(density)), bins = 50, fill = "#003366", color = "#011", alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_line(data = df, aes(x = x, y = y), color = "#9B1B30", linewidth = 1) +
  labs(title = "Observed distribution vs. Normal distribution",
       x = "Log CBT",
       y = "Desnity") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 12, face = "bold"),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 12), axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "lightgray", linewidth = 0.5),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), legend.position = "top", legend.title = element_text(face = "bold")
    )

mu <- mean(data$`Log SCC`, na.rm = TRUE)
var <- var(data$`Log SCC`, na.rm = TRUE)

x <- seq(min(data$`Log SCC`, na.rm = TRUE), max(data$`Log SCC`, na.rm = TRUE), length.out = 500)
df <- data.frame(x = x, y = dnorm(x, mean = mu, sd = sqrt(var)))

p2 <- ggplot(data, aes(x = `Log SCC`)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y = after_stat(density)), bins = 50, fill = "#003366", color = "#011", alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_line(data = df, aes(x = x, y = y), color = "#9B1B30", linewidth = 1) +
  labs(title = "Observed distribution vs. Normal distribution",
       x = "Log SCC",
       y = "Density") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 12, face = "bold"),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 12), axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "lightgray", linewidth = 0.5),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), legend.position = "top", legend.title = element_text(face = "bold")
    )

wrap_plots(c(p1, p2), ncol = 2)
```

```{r, analysis.1, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, fig.width = 12}
if (!file.exists("data/results/glm models.rds")) {
  glm_results <- list(
    LINmodCBT = glm(`Log CBT` ~ Season + Year + Season * Year + `Risk - IBR` + `Risk - AGAL` + `Risk - PT`, family = gaussian, data = dt_analysis),

    LINmodSCC = glm(`Log SCC` ~ Season + Year + Season * Year + `Risk - IBR` + `Risk - AGAL` + `Risk - PT`, family = gaussian, data = dt_analysis)
  )

  saveRDS(glm_results, file = "data/results/glm models.rds")
}

if (!file.exists("data/results/mixed models.rds")) {
  mixed_models_results <- list(
    LINmixedFarmCBT = lmer(formula = `Log CBT` ~ Season + Year + Season * Year + `Risk - IBR` + `Risk - AGAL` + `Risk - PT` + (1|Farm), data = dt_analysis, REML = FALSE),

    LINmixedYear.FarmCBT = lmer(formula = `Log CBT` ~ Season + Year + Season * Year + `Risk - IBR` + `Risk - AGAL` + `Risk - PT` + (Year_num|Farm), data = dt_analysis, REML = FALSE),

    LINmixedFarmSCC = lmer(formula = `Log SCC` ~ Season + Year + Season * Year + `Risk - IBR` + `Risk - AGAL` + `Risk - PT` + (1|Farm), data = dt_analysis, REML = FALSE),

    LINmixedYear.FarmSCC = lmer(formula = `Log SCC` ~ Season + Year + Season * Year + `Risk - IBR` + `Risk - AGAL` + `Risk - PT` + (Year_num|Farm), data = dt_analysis, REML = FALSE)
  )

  saveRDS(mixed_models_results, file = "data/results/mixed models.rds")
}

if (!file.exists("data/results/gamlss models.rds")) {
  plan(multisession, workers = parallel::detectCores() - 1)

  gamlss_results <- future_lapply(
    X = models_gamlss,
    FUN = function(mod) {
      run_model_safely(
        spec = mod,            # model
        data = datasets        # data
      )
    },
    future.packages = c("gamlss", "nlme"),
    future.seed = TRUE,
    future.globals = list(datasets = datasets, run_model_safely = run_model_safely)
  )

  saveRDS(gamlss_results, file = "data/results/gamlss models.rds")
}

glm_results <- readRDS(file = "data/results/glm models.rds")
mixed_models_results <- readRDS(file = "data/results/mixed models.rds")
gamlss_results <- readRDS(file = "data/results/gamlss models.rds")
```

```{r, results.1, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, fig.width = 12}
objects_CBT <- list(
  "Linear Model" = glm_results$LINmodCBT,
  "Linear Mixed Model 1|Farm" = mixed_models_results$LINmixedFarmCBT,
  "Linear Mixed Model Year|Farm" = mixed_models_results$LINmixedYear.FarmCBT,
  "GAMLSS Linear Model 1|Farm" = gamlss_results$LINFarmCBT,
  "GAMLSS Linear Model Year|Farm" = gamlss_results$LINYear.FarmCBT,
  "GAMLSS Box-Cox t distribution 1|Farm" = gamlss_results$BCTFarmCBT,
  "GAMLSS Box-Cox t distribution Year|Farm" = gamlss_results$BCTYear.FarmCBT,
  "GAMLSS Skew t distribution type 2 1|Farm" = gamlss_results$ST2FarmCBT,
  "GAMLSS Skew t distribution type 2 Year|Farm" = gamlss_results$ST2Year.FarmCBT
  )

model_selection_criteria(objects_CBT)
```

```{r, results.2, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, fig.width = 12}
ggplot_gamlss_diagnostics(
  gamlss_results$BCTYear.FarmCBT,
  summaries = FALSE, model = "BCTYear.Farm - CBT", save = FALSE
  )

ggplot_gamlss_diagnostics(
  gamlss_results$ST2Year.FarmCBT,
  summaries = FALSE, model = "ST2Year.Farm - CBT", save = FALSE
  )
```

```{r, results.3, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, fig.width = 12}
summary(gamlss_results$ST2Year.FarmCBT)

getSmo(gamlss_results$ST2Year.FarmCBT)
```

```{r, results.4, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, fig.width = 12}
objects_SCC <- list(
  "Linear Model" = glm_results$LINmodSCC,
  "Linear Mixed Model 1|Farm" = mixed_models_results$LINmixedFarmSCC,
  "Linear Mixed Model Year|Farm" = mixed_models_results$LINmixedYear.FarmSCC,
  "GAMLSS Linear Model 1|Farm" = gamlss_results$LINFarmSCC,
  "GAMLSS Linear Model Year|Farm" = gamlss_results$LINYear.FarmSCC,
  "GAMLSS Box-Cox t distribution 1|Farm" = gamlss_results$BCTFarmSCC,
  "GAMLSS Box-Cox t distribution Year|Farm" = gamlss_results$BCTYear.FarmSCC,
  "GAMLSS Skew t distribution type 2 1|Farm" = gamlss_results$ST2FarmSCC,
  "GAMLSS Skew t distribution type 2 Year|Farm" = gamlss_results$ST2Year.FarmSCC
  )

model_selection_criteria(objects_SCC)
```

```{r, results.5, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, fig.width = 12}
ggplot_gamlss_diagnostics(
  gamlss_results$BCTYear.FarmSCC,
  summaries = FALSE, model = "BCTYear.Farm - SCC", save = FALSE
  )

ggplot_gamlss_diagnostics(
  gamlss_results$ST2Year.FarmSCC,
  summaries = FALSE, model = "ST2Year.Farm - SCC", save = FALSE
  )
```

```{r, results.6, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, fig.width = 12}
summary(gamlss_results$BCTYear.FarmSCC)

getSmo(gamlss_results$BCTYear.FarmSCC)
```

```{r, results.7, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, fig.width = 12}
models <- list(
  "Skew t distribution type 2 Year|Farm for Log TBC" = gamlss_results$ST2Year.FarmCBT,
  "Skew t distribution type 2 Year|Farm for Log SCC" = gamlss_results$ST2Year.FarmSCC
)

ggplot_coefficients(models)
```

```{r, preparation.2, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, fig.width = 12}
threshold <- min(dt$`Log CBT`)

mu  <- mean(dt$`Log CBT` - threshold, na.rm = TRUE)
var <- var(dt$`Log CBT` - threshold, na.rm = TRUE)

shape <- (mu^2) / var
rate <- mu / var

x_seq <- seq(threshold, max(dt$`Log CBT`, na.rm = TRUE), length.out = 500)
df_gamma <- data.frame(x = x_seq, y = dgamma(x_seq - threshold, shape = shape, rate = rate))

p1 <- ggplot(dt, aes(x = `Log CBT`)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y = after_stat(density)), bins = 50, fill = "#003366", color = "#011", alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_line(data = df_gamma, aes(x = x, y = y), color = "#9B1B30", linewidth = 1) +
  labs(title = "Observed distribution vs. Shifted Gamma distribution",
       x = "Log CBT",
       y = "Density") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 12, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12), axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "lightgray", linewidth = 0.5),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), legend.position = "top", legend.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

threshold <- min(dt$`Log SCC`)

mu  <- mean(dt$`Log SCC` - threshold, na.rm = TRUE)
var <- var(dt$`Log SCC` - threshold, na.rm = TRUE)

shape <- (mu^2) / var
rate <- mu / var

x_seq <- seq(threshold, max(dt$`Log SCC`, na.rm = TRUE), length.out = 500)
df_gamma <- data.frame(x = x_seq, y = dgamma(x_seq - threshold, shape = shape, rate = rate))

p2 <- ggplot(dt, aes(x = `Log SCC`)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y = after_stat(density)), bins = 50, fill = "#003366", color = "#011", alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_line(data = df_gamma, aes(x = x, y = y), color = "#9B1B30", linewidth = 1) +
  labs(title = "Observed distribution vs. Shifted Gamma distribution",
       x = "Log SCC",
       y = "Density") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 12, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12), axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "lightgray", linewidth = 0.5),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), legend.position = "top", legend.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

wrap_plots(c(p1, p2), ncol = 2)
```

```{r, analysis.2, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, fig.width = 12}
if (!file.exists("data/results/glm models restricted.rds")) {
  glm_restricted <- list(
    GammaCBT = glm(`Log CBT` ~ Season + Year + Season * Year + `Risk - IBR` + `Risk - AGAL` + `Risk - PT`, family = Gamma(link = "identity"), data = dt),

    GammaSCC = glm(`Log SCC` ~ Season + Year + Season * Year + `Risk - IBR` + `Risk - AGAL` + `Risk - PT`, family = Gamma(link = "identity"), data = dt)
  )
  
  saveRDS(glm_restricted, file = "data/results/glm models restricted.rds")
}

if (!file.exists("data/results/mixed models restricted.rds")) {
  mixed_models_restricted <- list(
    GammaMixedFarmCBT = glmer(formula = `Log CBT` ~ Season + Year + Season * Year + `Risk - IBR` + `Risk - AGAL` + `Risk - PT` + (1|Farm), family = Gamma(link = "identity"), data = dt),

    GammaMixedYear.FarmCBT = glmer(formula = `Log CBT` ~ Season + Year + Season * Year + `Risk - IBR` + `Risk - AGAL` + `Risk - PT` + (Year_num|Farm), family = Gamma(link = "identity"), data = dt),

    GammaMixedFarmSCC = glmer(formula = `Log SCC` ~ Season + Year + Season * Year + `Risk - IBR` + `Risk - AGAL` + `Risk - PT` + (1|Farm), family = Gamma(link = "identity"), data = dt),

    GammaMixedYear.FarmSCC = glmer(formula = `Log SCC` ~ Season + Year + Season * Year + `Risk - IBR` + `Risk - AGAL` + `Risk - PT` + (Year_num|Farm), Gamma(link = "identity"), data = dt)
  )

  saveRDS(mixed_models_restricted, file = "data/results/mixed models restricted.rds")
}

if (!file.exists("data/results/gamlss models restricted.rds")) {
  plan(multisession, workers = 2)

  gamlss_restricted <- future_lapply(
    X = models_gamlss_restricted,
    FUN = function(mod) {
      run_model_safely(
        spec = mod,            # model
        data = datasets,       # data
        optimizer = "optim"    # optimizer
      )
    },
    future.packages = c("gamlss", "nlme"),
    future.seed = TRUE,
    future.globals = list(datasets = datasets, run_model_safely = run_model_safely)
  )

  saveRDS(gamlss_restricted, file = "data/results/gamlss models restricted.rds")
}

glm_restricted <- readRDS(file = "data/results/glm models restricted.rds")
mixed_models_restricted <- readRDS(file = "data/results/mixed models restricted.rds")
gamlss_restricted <- readRDS(file = "data/results/gamlss models restricted.rds")
```

```{r, results.8, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, fig.width = 12}
objects_restricted_CBT <- list(
  "Gamma Model" = glm_restricted$GammaCBT,
  "Gamma Mixed Model 1|Farm" = mixed_models_restricted$GammaMixedFarmCBT,
  "Gamma Mixed Model Year|Farm" = mixed_models_restricted$GammaMixedYear.FarmCBT,
  "GAMLSS Gamma Model 1|Farm" = gamlss_restricted$GammaFarmCBT,
  "GAMLSS Gamma Model Year|Farm" = gamlss_restricted$GammaYear.FarmCBT,
  "GAMLSS Generalized Gamma Model 1|Farm" = gamlss_restricted$GeneralizedGammaFarmCBT,
  "GAMLSS Generalized Gamma Model Year|Farm" = gamlss_restricted$GeneralizedGammaYear.FarmCBT,
  "GAMLSS Exponential Gaussian 1|Farm" = gamlss_restricted$ExGaussFarmCBT,
  "GAMLSS Exponential Gaussian Year|Farm" = gamlss_restricted$ExGaussYear.FarmCBT
  )

model_selection_criteria(objects_restricted_CBT)
```

```{r, results.9, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, fig.width = 12}
summary(gamlss_restricted$GeneralizedGammaFarmCBT)

getSmo(gamlss_restricted$GeneralizedGammaFarmCBT)
```

```{r, results.10, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, fig.width = 12}
ggplot_gamlss_diagnostics(
  gamlss_restricted$GeneralizedGammaFarmCBT,
  summaries = FALSE, model = "GeneralizedGammaYear.Farm - CBT", save = FALSE
  )
```

```{r, results.11, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, fig.width = 12}
objects_restricted_SCC <- list(
  "Gamma Model" = glm_restricted$GammaSCC,
  "Gamma Mixed Model 1|Farm" = mixed_models_restricted$GammaMixedFarmSCC,
  "Gamma Mixed Model Year|Farm" = mixed_models_restricted$GammaMixedYear.FarmSCC,
  "GAMLSS Gamma Model 1|Farm" = gamlss_restricted$GammaFarmSCC,
  "GAMLSS Gamma Model Year|Farm" = gamlss_restricted$GammaYear.FarmSCC,
  "GAMLSS Generalized Gamma Model 1|Farm" = gamlss_restricted$GeneralizedGammaFarmSCC,
  "GAMLSS Generalized Gamma Model Year|Farm" = gamlss_restricted$GeneralizedGammaYear.FarmSCC,
  "GAMLSS Exponential Gaussian 1|Farm" = gamlss_restricted$ExGaussFarmSCC,
  "GAMLSS Exponential Gaussian Year|Farm" = gamlss_restricted$ExGaussYear.FarmSCC
)

model_selection_criteria(objects_restricted_SCC)
```

```{r, results.12, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, fig.width = 12}
summary(gamlss_restricted$GeneralizedGammaYear.FarmSCC)

getSmo(gamlss_restricted$GeneralizedGammaYear.FarmSCC)
```

```{r, results.13, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, fig.width = 12}
ggplot_gamlss_diagnostics(
  gamlss_restricted$GeneralizedGammaYear.FarmSCC,
  summaries = FALSE, model = "GeneralizedGammaYear.Farm - SCC", save = FALSE
  )
```

```{r, results.14, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, fig.width = 12}
models <- list(
  "Generalized Gamma Year|Farm for Log CBT" = gamlss_restricted$GeneralizedGammaYear.FarmCBT,
  "Generalized Gamma Year|Farm for Log SCC" = gamlss_restricted$GeneralizedGammaYear.FarmSCC
  )

ggplot_coefficients(models)
```
